commit_scope: Retune real mesh training emitters so adb is install-only and runtime training can use loopback, Bluetooth, audio, video, screen, and other bidirectional channels.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/pareto.fk form-stdlib/autoresearch-loop.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-carrier.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-emitter.fk form-stdlib/tests/real-mesh-training-emitter-band.fk

scripts/real_mesh_training_emitters.sh --run-models --ollama-model llama3.2:3b --channel-evidence bluetooth-heartbeat bluetooth-le-gatt .cache/real-mesh-training/channel-evidence/bluetooth.json 120 --channel-evidence optical-loop screen-camera-optical .cache/real-mesh-training/channel-evidence/optical.json 240 --out .cache/real-mesh-training/windows/loopback-channel-proof-20260615
local_validation.notes: real-mesh-training-emitter now validates at verdict 2047 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. The band proves bidirectional runtime channels across loopback, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, ultrasonic/near-ultrasonic audio, video/screen optical, NFC, and USB-accessory families; rejects adb-install-only as runtime communication; and rejects presence-only channels as insufficient for training. The host proof observed 4 live sources, 4 runtime channels, 4 bidirectional channels, and 3 completed local processes, with no adb block.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form and host-carrier slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Runtime testing and training no longer depend on adb visibility. adb is install/provisioning only; loopback, Bluetooth, audio, video, screen, NFC, Wi-Fi, and USB-accessory channel receipts can carry runtime training evidence.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Form and host-carrier proof
test_flows: scripts/real_mesh_training_emitters.sh --run-models --ollama-model llama3.2:3b --channel-evidence bluetooth-heartbeat bluetooth-le-gatt .cache/real-mesh-training/channel-evidence/bluetooth.json 120 --channel-evidence optical-loop screen-camera-optical .cache/real-mesh-training/channel-evidence/optical.json 240 --out .cache/real-mesh-training/windows/loopback-channel-proof-20260615

phase_gate.gate: Runtime training communication must be bidirectional channel evidence, not adb device visibility.
phase_gate.next: After PR CI, connect real Bluetooth/audio/optical channel probes and large train/heldout roots to produce an active receipt with --require-active.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: The emitter treated adb visibility as a host/device signal and could block local runtime training when adb did not list a phone.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: Runtime training accepts bidirectional channel receipts from loopback, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, ultrasonic audio, optical video/screen, NFC, or USB-accessory sources; adb is install-only and cannot satisfy runtime communication.
retuned_north_star: install/provision with adb only when needed
train and test over live bidirectional channels that the devices can actually use together
attach external channel probe evidence without hiding it as a fake sensor or adb path
dashboard and route choice read bidirectional channel counts beside process/data floors
